source_pr.title: executor: optimization for insert on duplicate key update
source_pr.body:
Batch update duplicate keys for insert executor. 
PTAL @coocood

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select * from test.t where a < 1 order by a limit 0;").Check(testkit.Rows()) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select * from test.t where a < 1 order by a limit 0;").Check(testkit.Rows()) (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select * from test.t where a < 1 order by a limit 0;").Check(testkit.Rows()) (executor/executor_test.go)

files: distsql/distsql.go, distsql/stream.go, executor/distsql.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_pkg_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/index_lookup_join.go, executor/pkg_test.go, executor/write.go, executor/write_test.go, expression/builtin.go, plan/cbo_test.go, plan/common_plans.go, plan/gen_physical_plans.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plan_test.go, plan/stats.go, plan/topn_push_down.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, server/http_handler_test.go, server/util_test.go, sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo.go, sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo_test.go, sessionctx/variable/session.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, statistics/selectivity.go, store/mockstore/mocktikv/mvcc.go, store/mockstore/mocktikv/mvcc_leveldb.go, store/store_test.go, store/tikv/pd_codec.go, structure/type.go, table/tables/index.go, table/tables/tables.go, util/codec/bench_test.go, util/codec/bytes.go, util/codec/bytes_test.go, util/codec/codec.go, util/codec/codec_test.go, util/ranger/detacher.go, util/ranger/ranger_test.go
